SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Your Trusted Bakersfield Handyman

Next Frame Construction started with a simple goal: to provide Bakersfield residents with reliable, high-quality handyman services. Tired of seeing neighbors struggle with unfinished projects and unreliable contractors, we built a business on honesty, integrity, and a commitment to doing the job right the first time.

We approach every project, big or small, with meticulous attention to detail. From patching drywall to installing new fixtures, we treat your home as if it were our own. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding your expectations.

We're proud to be a part of the Bakersfield community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to give back whenever possible. Choosing Next Frame Construction means supporting a local business that cares about its neighbors.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Next Frame Construction

Experienced Professionals

Our team is comprised of skilled and experienced handymen with a proven track record of quality workmanship.

Reliable & On-Time

We understand your time is valuable. We arrive on schedule and complete projects efficiently.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees or surprises. We provide upfront, honest estimates for all our services.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

We're not happy until you are. We stand behind our work and ensure your complete satisfaction.

Get Your Free Estimate Today!

Let Next Frame Construction take care of your home repair needs. Contact us for a free quote.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Next Frame Construction did an excellent job repairing a large hole in my living room wall. The texture matching was perfect, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Drywall Repair
“

I had a leaky faucet that was driving me crazy. Next Frame Construction came out quickly and fixed it without any issues. Professional and efficient service.

David B. Plumbing Repair
“

Next Frame Construction painted my entire house, and it looks fantastic! The crew was very professional and paid close attention to detail. They even helped me choose the perfect colors.

Linda G. Painting Services
“

I needed some custom shelves built in my garage, and Next Frame Construction did an amazing job. The shelves are sturdy and well-built, and they perfectly fit the space. Great craftsmanship!

Robert L. Carpentry Services
“

My fence was damaged in a recent windstorm, and Next Frame Construction repaired it quickly and effectively. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

Susan K. Fence Repair
“

We had water damage in our bathroom and Next Frame Construction did a fantastic job repairing the drywall and painting. They were on time, professional, and the work was excellent. We would definitely use them again!

Michael P. Drywall Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does drywall repair take?
The duration depends on the size and complexity of the repair. Small patches can be completed in a few hours, while larger repairs may take a day or two.
Will the repaired area match my existing wall texture?
Yes, we carefully match textures to ensure a seamless blend with your existing walls. We have experience with a variety of textures common in Bakersfield homes.
Do you offer painting services after drywall repair?
Yes, we provide complete painting services to ensure a consistent and professional finish. We can match any paint color.
